caption: The video shows a static map of Haiti and the surrounding Caribbean region, with various city names like Cap-Haïtien, Saint-Marc, and Santo Domingo visible. White text overlays the map, appearing sequentially across the frames. The first frame displays the text "Entre 2000 et 2014, la pauvreté extrême a diminué de 31 à 24 pour cent en Haïti." The second frame transitions to a new sentence: "Aujourd'hui, environ 2,5 millions de personnes, environ un quart de la population,". This sentence continues into the third frame with the words "sont incapables de satisfaire leurs besoins alimentaires de base." Finally, the fourth frame presents the concluding statement: "Le seul PMA de l'hémisphère occidental, Haïti reste l'un des pays les plus inégalitaires du monde." No people, objects, or logos are visible throughout the sequence, only the consistent background map and the changing text.
